message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--删除用户用例的顺序图

actor "sysAdmin" as sysAdmin
participant "边界类\nmaintainUsersWindow" as maintainUsersWindow
participant "控制类\nMaintainUsers" as MaintainUsers
participant "users" as users
database "数据库存储" as db

activate sysAdmin
sysAdmin -> maintainUsersWindow : 删除用户
activate maintainUsersWindow
maintainUsersWindow -> MaintainUsers : 删除用户请求
activate MaintainUsers
MaintainUsers -> users : 确认删除的用户信息
activate users
users -> db : 数据库存储实验数据
activate db
deactivate db
db -->> sysAdmin : 根据系统管理员删除的用户信息返回数据
deactivate users
deactivate MaintainUsers
sysAdmin -> maintainUsersWindow : 退出请求
maintainUsersWindow -> maintainUsersWindow : 保存退出
deactivate maintainUsersWindow
destroy maintainUsersWindow
deactivate sysAdmin

@enduml
```
